calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Amended Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-13-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for hearing this day for the name change of a minor. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon. Petitioner, Zheng Xie, was sworn and examined. There was no appearance by the mother but the petitioner stated to the court that the mother also resides with the minor. Good cause appearing, the court signed the decree changing the name of the minor to Jason Xie.

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
